name: ArtistAmeliaRose
tagline: Digital art tutorials and commission works
description:
ArtistAmeliaRose is a subscription-based platform where professional digital artist Amelia provides in-depth resources for learning and practicing digital art. It focuses on demystifying the creative process through comprehensive, real-project tutorials.

The core offering includes detailed step-by-step tutorials that break down complex illustrations into manageable stages, from initial sketch to final render. A key feature is the library of real-time and time-lapse process videos, allowing you to observe Amelia's exact brushwork, layer management, and decision-making. Subscribers also get access to exclusive content like high-resolution source files (PSDs), custom brush sets, and early looks at her commission works, which serve as advanced case studies.

This tool is specifically for aspiring to intermediate digital artists who want to move beyond basic tools and understand a professional workflow. It’s also valuable for artists struggling with artistic block, seeking technical guidance on software like Photoshop or Procreate.

The main benefit is gaining a structured, behind-the-scenes look at a working artist's process, saving you from guesswork and providing actionable techniques you can apply directly to your own projects.

A clear use case is an artist wanting to improve their character portrait lighting. They can follow a dedicated tutorial on rendering skin tones, download the accompanying source file to examine the layer structure, and watch the time-lapse to see the speed and flow of the shading process, then apply those methods to their original work.
